reviews.review_title: Worth it just for the stunts!
reviews.review_description:
You can race, you can try to carry objects to the end of bumpy tracks without them falling out of your basket or you can do the stunts.
There is a leaderboard that keeps you coming back to set better times (or indeed one).
The Asian theme is nice. I like the fire breathing dragon statues.
You can also free roam around some scenes.

Mountain Bike Downhill – Asia builds on the studio’s experience with mountain biking games and delivers a fun ride through beautiful Asian landscapes. The game features four different modes, each offering a slightly different way to play — with the stunt mode being my personal favorite thanks to its creativity and freedom.

The execution is solid, and it’s genuinely fun competing against AI riders, transporting cargo from point A to point B, or simply roaming the environments freely. Each mode adds variety and keeps the gameplay fresh.

Progression is well structured too: you need to complete levels to unlock the next ones, which keeps you motivated to improve your runs. Overall, it’s a very addictive downhill experience and definitely worth giving a try. 🚴‍♀️🎮

The game does an excellent job at bringing the mountainbike hobby to VR, it is set in asia, therefore all courses have a beautifull asian vibe. A really nice sports game for a very reasonable price tag.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice review!
